MELItem.Title: Overhead Flight Attendant Rest (OFAR) Humidification System

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided water supply valve is deactivated closed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the OFAR humidification system water supply valve closed (AMM DDG 21-71-03).

ListItem.Para: On AIR DISTRIBUTION EICAS maintenance page 2, confirm attendant rest HUMID S/O VLV indicates CLSD.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HUMIDIFIER- ATTEND CREW REST and lock with an INOP tag.
If HUMID S/O VLV did not indicate CLSD in step 1:
Gain access to the humidifier shutoff valve.
Turn the manual open/close knob to set the valve in the closed position.
